title: MongoDB Q3 FY2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: MongoDB Q3 FY2023 generated total revenue of $333.6 million, up 47% year-over-year. Atlas revenue grew 61% YoY, representing 63% of total revenue. Gross margin improved to 74% from 73% in the prior year period. Operating margin: 6% compared to 3% in prior year. Net income: $18.7 million or $0.23 per diluted share. Free cash flow was negative $8.4 million. Total customer count: 39,100+, up from 31,000 year-ago. Direct sales customers: 5,900+, up from 3,900. Customers with $100k+ ARR: 1,545, up from 1,201. Net ARR expansion rate above 120%. Michael Gordon noted Enterprise Advanced significantly exceeded expectations in the quarter with more multiyear deals than anticipated. Q4 2023 guidance: Revenue $334-$337 million, Operating margin $6-8 million (non-GAAP), EPS $0.06-$0.08 per share. Full Year FY2023: Revenue $1.257-$1.260 billion, Operating margin 2.5% at midpoint, Expected margin improvement of ~100 basis points. Atlas consumption improved in Q3 versus Q2, though management noted this improvement included emerging seasonal patterns.
